/usr/bin/ar qc libdtome_core.a CMakeFiles/dtome_core.dir/Components/Exchange/Exchange.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dtome_core.dir/Components/Market/Market.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dtome_core.dir/Components/MatchingEngine/MatchingEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dtome_core.dir/Components/Order/Order.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dtome_core.dir/Components/OrderBook/OrderBook.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dtome_core.dir/Components/OrderQueue/OrderQueue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dtome_core.dir/Components/Trade/Trade.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libdtome_core.a
